primary_operations.name: Call
primary_operations.sdk_call: out, err := h.useCase.Execute(req.Msg.Payload); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return connect.NewResponse(&Response{Payload: out}), nil

code_style_notes: connect-go handler signatures use generic *connect.Request[T] / *connect.Response[T] wrappers
Register via NewServiceHandler(handler) which returns an http.Handler
